chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-440 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on MA 3577/24 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on MA 3578/24 4.For hearing of main case 5.For orders on MA 3579/24 18-10-2024 M/s Qasim Ali Shah and Abdul Salam Abbasi, Advocates for the applicant. **** Counsel for applicant submits that in compliance of impugned order dated 06.08.2024, FIR No. 147 of 2024 has been registered at P.S, C-section, Sukkur, therefore, this Crl. Misc. Application has become infructuous and accordingly same is disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
